ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #2, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-21-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Field for Lisa Lee (Petitioner). Peter Bresler for Lawrence Lee (Beneficiary).

Mr. Bresler stated that his Client is not objecting. Ms. Field presented oral argument to support fees. The Court granted the accounting petition (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy S. Park. (Not Reported)

Off Calendar Aug-06-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Field for and with Lisa Lee. Peter Bresler for Lawrence Lee. Lambert Lee in Propria Persona.

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to Lawrence's late filings, fees to litigation Counsel, Trustee fees, Attorney fees, Lisa's actions as power of attorney, Lawrence being unresponsive, etc. The Court granted the ex parte application for order shortening time (subject to receipt and review of the order). Mr. Bresler is to provide the proposed order to Ms. Field for approval as to form. The accounting petition and the petitions for fees were taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT
Off Calendar May-27-2014 Continued To Jul-15-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Field for and with Lisa Lee. Lambert Lee was also present.

The Court noted that Mr. Bresler was not present. Ms. Field stated that she spoke with Mr. Bresler, that he had an injury and that she filed a declaration in response to the Probate Examiner's notes. Ms. Field also stated that they can't make final distribution because in the settlement Lawrence Lee is to pay a $90,000.00 surcharge and he only gets $18,000.00 back, that Lambert Lee is in financial difficulty, that the $100,000.00 preliminary distribution is an equal proportioned share, spoke of the percentages each beneficiary is to receive and stated that they are waiting to have attorney fee petitions on calendar. In addition, Ms. Field requested deadlines for filing of the fee petitions, responses and replies. Mr. Lee asked for $75,000.00 to assist with his situation. The accounting petition was taken under submission. The Court will issue an order setting deadlines.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy D. Jones. (Not Reported)

Notice Of Motion For Reconsideration Of Order Denying Mo. To Reduce Settlement To Judgment
Off Calendar May-15-2013 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Apperances: Nancy Fields for Lisa Lee. Gerard Launay for Lawrence Lee.

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions. The Court adopted it's tentative ruling. The motion for reconsideration is denied (order for the same signed in open court). The Court urged parties to settle the remaining issue. Counsel agreed to utilize pro bono mediation and requested to put the settlement on the record if the parties reach that process. The Court agreed to allow that request. The June 5, 2013 hearing is continued to July 17, 2013 at 9:00a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Lillian Sing. Clerk: Nancy Bautista/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Mar-27-2013 Continued To Jun-05-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Field for and with Lisa Lee (Trustee). Gerard Launay for Lawrence Lee (Former Trustee).

Ms. Field stated that she submitted a proposed settlement to opposing counsel, it was rejected, and that this matter needs to be set for trial. Mr. Launay stated that he would file a motion for reconsideration for Judge Sing's order denying his motion to reduce settlement agreement to judgment. Status for trial setting is continued to June 5, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court encourages the parties to mediate.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip/Nancy Bautista. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR The Issue Of Surcharge Against Lawrence Lee
Off Calendar Mar-27-2013 Continued To Jun-05-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Notice Of Motion To Reduce Settlement Agreement.
Off Calendar Mar-20-2013 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Field for Lisa Lee (Successor Trustee). Gerard Launay for Lawrence Lee (Former Trustee).

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to the terms of the settlement agreement for distribution to Lawrence Lee. After hearing argument from both sides the Court adopted the tenative ruling. Motion to reduce settlement agreement to judgment is denied. Ms. Field to prepare a form of order.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Ella Yip/ Nancy Bautista.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Feb-13-2013 Continued To Mar-27-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR The Issue Of Surcharge Against Lawrence Lee
Off Calendar Feb-13-2013 Continued To Mar-27-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Dec-19-2012 Continued To Feb-13-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Field and Richard Hill (Litigation Counsel) for and with Lisa Lee. Peter Bresler for Lawrence Lee. Lambert Lee also present in Propria Persona.

The Parties are in dispute with regard to issue of whether Lawrence is entitled to 45% of the $83,000.00 that is going into the trust. The Court pointed out that there is a signed agreement and asked the Parties if there was any point in going back to mediation. Discussion was held regarding filing of a CCP 664 Motion. The accounting petition and the issue of surcharge against Lawrence Lee were continued to February 13, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to allow time for someone to file a motion.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR The Issue Of Surcharge Against Lawrence Lee
Off Calendar Dec-19-2012 Continued To Feb-13-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR The Issue Of Surcharge Against Lawrence Lee
Off Calendar Aug-29-2012 Continued To Oct-24-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Field for Lisa Lee (Trustee). Peter Bressler for Lawrence Lee.

Ms. Field stated that she sent a full settlement proposal to Mr. Bressler in June, and that there has been e-mailing and discussion. The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. Mediation is to be completed by Ocotber 17, 12. The Parties are to report to the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by October 19, 2012. The surcharge issue and the accounting petition were continued to October 24, 2012 at 9:00 a.m, in Dept. 204 for status on mediation. The Parties are to determine if they will proceed with Pro Bono Mediation or do private mediation. The Court signed the Order Referring the Case to Pro Bono Mediation but dated it for September 4, 2012 and will hold it until that date. If the Court is notified by September 4, 2012 of private mediation, the order will not be processed.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Santiago.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Aug-29-2012 Continued To Oct-24-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR The Issue Of Surcharge Against Lawrence Lee
Off Calendar May-07-2012 Continued To Jun-25-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Peter Bressler for and with Lawrence Lee. Nancy Field and Richard Hill for Lisa Lee.

The Court noted that Lambert Lee was not present. The issue of surcharge against Lawrence Lee and the Accounting Petition were continued to June 25, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for service of the latest papers and to give the Objectors the opportunity to react to the May 3rd amendment to the account and to the objections that have been filed. The Court does not expect any further amendments without a stipulation and Court order. Mr. Bressler withdrew the April 26, 2012 amendment.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Clauzel.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Lawrence Lee'S Accounting And The Issue Of Surcharge
Off Calendar Feb-27-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Field for and with Lisa Lee (Successor Trustee). Richard Hill Litigation Counsel for Lisa Lee. Peter Bressler for and with Lawrence Lee (Former Trustee). Lambert Lee in Propria Persona.

Mr. Bressler stated that the accounting petition was filed today with a hearing date of May 1, 2012. Status of the accounting was taken off calendar. The issue of surcharge against Lawrence Lee was continued to May 7, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for further status.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of Lisa Lee'S Bond
Off Calendar Jan-23-2012 Off Calendar

Petition For Removal Of Trustee For Acceptance Of Resignation Of Co-Trustee, For Acccounting By Trustee, For Appt. Of Petitioner As Successor Trustee,
Off Calendar Jan-20-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Field and Richard Hill for and with Lisa Lee. Peter Bressler for and with Lawrence Lee (Trustee). Lambert Lee in Propria Persona also present.

Mr. Bressler stated that his Client was unable to obtain a bond. The Court granted the Petition for Removal of Trustee, etc. (subject to receipt of the order). Lisa Lee is appointed as Successor Trustee subject to posting of a $60,000.00 bond. Lawrence Lee is to account for the period of March 5, 2011 through January 15, 2012. Status of Lawrence Lee's accounting and the issue of surcharge was set for February 27, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status of filing of Lisa Lee's bond was set for January 23, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Ms. Field is to prepare the order.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition For Removal Of Trustee For Acceptance Of Resignation Of Co-Trustee, For Acccounting By Trustee, For Appt. Of Petitioner As Successor Trustee,
Off Calendar Dec-12-2011 Continued To Jan-09-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Field for and with Lisa Lee. Peter Bressler appeared by telephone for Lawrence Lee. Lambert Lee in Propria Persona.

Mr. Bressler stated that he is not sure if his Client will qualify for a bond. Ms. Field expressed her concerns about Lawrence remaining as Trustee, Lawrence not being bonded, Mr. Bressler not responding to discovery, requested that he be removed and that her Cleint be appointed. Lambert Lee stated that he would only assign $250,000.00 of his interest and that he would like his Sister to take over as Trustee. The Petition for Removal of Trustee, etc. was continued to January 9, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to give Lawrence one more opportunity to comply with the Court's order concerning bond and for Ms. Field to prepare an Order to Show Cause for Lawrence to explain why he should not be removed as Trustee if bond is not posted by that date.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Brown.

Petition For Removal Of Trustee For Acceptance Of Resignation Of Co-Trustee, For Acccounting By Trustee, For Appt. Of Petitioner As Successor Trustee,
Off Calendar Nov-21-2011 Continued To Dec-12-11 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Removal Of Trustee For Acceptance Of Resignation Of Co-Trustee, For Acccounting By Trustee, For Appt. Of Petitioner As Successor Trustee,
Off Calendar Oct-24-2011 Continued To Nov-21-11 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Field for and with Lisa Lee. Peter Bressler for Lawrence Lee (Respondent). Lambert Lee in Propria Persona.

Lambert Lee waives notice of the petition. Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to suspension/removal of the Trustee, use of Trust funds and posting of bond. The Petition for Removal, etc. was continued to November 21, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of discovery, readiness of mediation, readiness of an evidentiary hearing and for status of posting of bond in the amount of $60,000.00 which is to be posted within 5 business days. Pending the evidentiary hearing, Lawrence Lee will have limited powers in which he is prohibited from disposing of or transferring of the property. Ms. Field will prepare an order with regard to the above.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Whitehead.
